history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a smartphone screen displaying a social media profile page with statistics, buttons, and two video thumbnails.

The main subject is the smartphone app interface, dominated by a large profile name header and follower-related metrics, with circular profile/video previews on the right and video preview panels near the lower middle.

The setting is an indoor, digital screen view with a white background and layered UI elements. The time of day and weather are not applicable.

Visual details include a top status area with small icons and numbers, followed by a large bold name text “Evan wawv” with a small pink circle containing the number “1” to the right. Under the name is a handle-like text line “@rezapah07”. Below that are three numeric metrics in black with labels underneath: “301” above “Mengikuti”, “1.349” above “Pengikut”, and “6.127” above “Suka”. Additional text “putrah daerah” appears beneath the metrics. Horizontal rounded buttons across the middle show icons and labels: “Pesanan Anda”, “Saldo”, and “Riwayat tontonan”. A long white notification-style bar reads “Buat Sorotan Story untuk profil Anda >” with a close icon on the right. Near the bottom center are two video thumbnail cards: the left thumbnail shows a person seated indoors, facing to the side, with overlaid text in Indonesian; the right thumbnail shows two figures in a room setting, partially blurred or pixelated. Along the bottom navigation bar are icons and labels including “Beranda”, “Toko”, a plus icon, “Kotak Masuk”, and “Profil”.

Practical Summary:
This is a screenshot of a social media profile interface showing the profile name, handle, follower and like counts, and several action buttons. It also displays two video thumbnails and a bottom navigation bar with sections like Home, Shop, Inbox, and Profile.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
